text: The word<S>1697</S> of Jehovah<S>3068</S> which came unto Zephaniah<S>6846</S> the son<S>1121</S> of Cushi<S>3570</S>, the son<S>1121</S> of Gedaliah<S>1436</S>, the son<S>1121</S> of Amariah<S>568</S>, the son<S>1121</S> of Hezekiah<S>2396</S>, in the days<S>3117</S> of Josiah<S>2977</S> the son<S>1121</S> of Amon<S>526</S>, king<S>4428</S> of Judah<S>3063</S>.
I will utterly<S>622</S> consume<S>5486</S> all things from off the face of the ground<S>6440</S>, saith<S>5002</S> Jehovah<S>3068</S>.

I will consume<S>5486</S> man<S>120</S> and beast<S>929</S>; I will consume<S>5486</S> the birds<S>5775</S> of the heavens<S>8064</S>, and the fishes<S>1709</S> of the sea<S>3220</S>, and the stumblingblocks<S>4384</S> with the wicked<S>7563</S>; and I will cut off<S>3772</S> man<S>120</S> from off<S>6440</S> the face of the ground<S>127</S>, saith<S>5002</S> Jehovah<S>3068</S>.

And I will stretch out<S>5186</S> my hand<S>3027</S> upon Judah<S>3063</S>, and upon all the inhabitants<S>3427</S> of Jerusalem<S>3389</S>; and I will cut off<S>3772</S> the remnant<S>7605</S> of Baal<S>1168</S> from this place<S>4725</S>, and the name<S>8034</S> of the Chemarim<S>3649</S> with the priests<S>3548</S>;

and them that worship<S>7812</S> the host<S>6635</S> of heaven<S>8064</S> upon the housetops<S>1406</S>; and them that worship<S>7812</S>, that swear<S>7650</S> to Jehovah<S>3068</S> and swear<S>7650</S> by Malcam<S>4428</S>;
and them that are turned back<S>5472</S> from<S>310</S> following Jehovah<S>3068</S>; and those that have not sought<S>1245</S> Jehovah<S>3068</S>, nor inquired after him<S>1875</S>.

Hold thy peace<S>2013</S> at the presence<S>6440</S> of the Lord<S>136</S> Jehovah<S>3068</S>; for the day<S>3117</S> of Jehovah<S>3068</S> is at hand<S>7138</S>: for Jehovah<S>3068</S> hath prepared<S>3559</S> a sacrifice<S>2077</S>, he hath consecrated<S>6942</S> his guests<S>7121</S>.

And it shall come to pass in the day<S>3117</S> of Jehovah<S>3068</S>'s sacrifice<S>2077</S>, that I will punish<S>6485</S> the princes<S>8269</S>, and the king<S>4428</S>'s sons<S>1121</S>, and all such as are clothed<S>3847</S> with foreign<S>5237</S> apparel<S>4403</S>.

And in that day<S>3117</S> I will punish<S>6485</S> all those that leap<S>1801</S> over the threshold<S>4670</S>, that fill<S>4390</S> their master<S>113</S>'s house<S>1004</S> with violence<S>2555</S> and deceit<S>4820</S>.

And in that day<S>3117</S>, saith<S>5002</S> Jehovah<S>3068</S>, there shall be the noise<S>6963</S> of a cry<S>6818</S> from the fish<S>1709</S> gate<S>8179</S>, and a wailing<S>3215</S> from the second<S>4932</S> quarter<S>1419</S>, and a great crashing<S>7667</S> from the hills<S>1389</S>.

Wail<S>3213</S>, ye inhabitants<S>3427</S> of Maktesh<S>4389</S>; for all the people<S>5971</S> of Canaan<S>3667</S> are undone<S>1820</S>; all they that were laden<S>5187</S> with silver<S>3701</S> are cut off<S>3772</S>.

And it shall come to pass at that time<S>6256</S>, that I will search<S>2664</S> Jerusalem<S>3389</S> with lamps<S>5216</S>; and I will punish<S>6485</S> the men<S>582</S> that are settled<S>7087</S> on their lees<S>8105</S>, that say<S>559</S> in their heart<S>3824</S>, Jehovah<S>3068</S> will not do good<S>3190</S>, neither will he do evil<S>7489</S>.

And their wealth<S>2428</S> shall become a spoil<S>4933</S>, and their houses<S>1004</S> a desolation<S>8077</S>: yea<S>1129</S>, they shall build houses<S>1004</S>, but shall not inhabit<S>3427</S> them<S>5193</S>; and they shall plant vineyards<S>3754</S>, but shall not drink<S>8354</S> the wine thereof<S>3196</S>.

The great<S>1419</S> day<S>3117</S> of Jehovah<S>3068</S> is near<S>7138</S>, it is near<S>7138</S> and hasteth<S>4118</S> greatly<S>3966</S>, even the voice<S>6963</S> of the day<S>3117</S> of Jehovah<S>3068</S>; the mighty man<S>1368</S> crieth<S>6873</S> there bitterly<S>4751</S>.

That day<S>3117</S> is a day<S>3117</S> of wrath<S>5678</S>, a day<S>3117</S> of trouble<S>6869</S> and distress<S>4691</S>, a day<S>3117</S> of wasteness<S>7722</S> and desolation<S>4875</S>, a day<S>3117</S> of darkness<S>2822</S> and gloominess<S>653</S>, a day<S>3117</S> of clouds<S>6051</S> and thick darkness<S>6205</S>,
a day<S>3117</S> of the trumpet<S>7782</S> and alarm<S>8643</S>, against the fortified<S>1219</S> cities<S>5892</S>, and against the high<S>1364</S> battlements<S>6438</S>.

And I will bring distress<S>6887</S> upon men<S>120</S>, that they shall walk<S>1980</S> like blind men<S>5787</S>, because they have sinned<S>2398</S> against Jehovah<S>3068</S>; and their blood<S>1818</S> shall be poured out<S>8210</S> as dust<S>6083</S>, and their flesh<S>3894</S> as dung<S>1561</S>.

Neither their silver<S>3701</S> nor their gold<S>2091</S> shall be able<S>3201</S> to deliver<S>5337</S> them in the day<S>3117</S> of Jehovah<S>3068</S>'s wrath<S>5678</S>; but the whole land<S>776</S> shall be devoured<S>398</S> by the fire<S>784</S> of his jealousy<S>7068</S>: for he will make<S>6213</S> an end<S>926</S>, yea, a terrible end<S>3617</S>, of all them that dwell<S>3427</S> in the land<S>776</S>.
Gather yourselves together<S>7197</S>, yea<S>7197</S>, gather together, O nation<S>1471</S> that hath no shame<S>3700</S>;

before the decree<S>2706</S> bring forth<S>3205</S>, before the day<S>3117</S> pass<S>5674</S> as the chaff<S>4671</S>, before<S>3808</S> the fierce<S>2740</S> anger<S>639</S> of Jehovah<S>3068</S> come<S>935</S> upon you<S>3117</S>, before the day of Jehovah<S>3068</S>'s anger<S>639</S> come upon you<S>935</S>.

Seek<S>1245</S> ye Jehovah<S>3068</S>, all ye meek<S>6035</S> of the earth<S>776</S>, that have kept<S>6466</S> his ordinances<S>4941</S>; seek<S>1245</S> righteousness<S>6664</S>, seek<S>1245</S> meekness<S>6038</S>: it may be<S>194</S> ye will be hid<S>5641</S> in the day<S>3117</S> of Jehovah<S>3068</S>'s anger<S>639</S>.

For Gaza<S>5804</S> shall be forsaken<S>5800</S>, and Ashkelon<S>831</S> a desolation<S>8077</S>; they shall drive out<S>1644</S> Ashdod<S>795</S> at noonday<S>6672</S>, and Ekron<S>6138</S> shall be rooted up<S>6131</S>.

Woe<S>1945</S> unto the inhabitants<S>3427</S> of the sea-coast<S>1471</S>, the nation of the Cherethites<S>3774</S>! The word<S>1697</S> of Jehovah<S>3068</S> is against you<S>3667</S>, O Canaan, the land<S>776</S> of the Philistines<S>6430</S>; I will destroy<S>6</S> thee<S>3427</S>, that there shall be no inhabitant.
And the sea<S>3220</S> - coast<S>2256</S> shall be pastures<S>5116</S>, with cottages<S>3741</S> for shepherds<S>7462</S> and folds<S>1448</S> for flocks<S>6629</S>.

And the coast<S>2256</S> shall be for the remnant<S>7611</S> of the house<S>1004</S> of Judah<S>3063</S>; they shall feed<S>7462</S> their flocks thereupon<S>1004</S>; in the houses of Ashkelon<S>831</S> shall they lie down<S>7257</S> in the evening<S>6153</S>; for Jehovah<S>3068</S> their God<S>430</S> will visit<S>6485</S> them<S>7725</S>, and bring back their captivity<S>7622</S>.

I have heard<S>8085</S> the reproach<S>2781</S> of Moab<S>4124</S>, and the revilings<S>1421</S> of the children<S>1121</S> of Ammon<S>5983</S>, wherewith they have reproached<S>2778</S> my people<S>5971</S>, and magnified<S>1431</S> themselves against their border<S>1366</S>.

Therefore as I live<S>2416</S>, saith<S>5002</S> Jehovah<S>3068</S> of hosts<S>6635</S>, the God<S>430</S> of Israel<S>3478</S>, Surely Moab<S>4124</S> shall be as Sodom<S>5467</S>, and the children<S>1121</S> of Ammon<S>5983</S> as Gomorrah<S>6017</S>, a possession<S>4476</S> of nettles<S>2738</S>, and saltpits<S>4379</S>, and a perpetual<S>5704</S> desolation<S>8077</S>: the residue<S>7611</S> of my people<S>5971</S> shall make a prey<S>962</S> of them<S>3499</S>, and the remnant of my nation<S>1471</S> shall inherit them<S>5157</S>.
This shall they have for their pride<S>1347</S>, because they have reproached<S>2778</S> and magnified<S>1431</S> themselves against the people<S>5971</S> of Jehovah<S>3068</S> of hosts<S>6635</S>.

Jehovah<S>3068</S> will be terrible<S>3372</S> unto them<S>7329</S>; for he will famish all the gods<S>430</S> of the earth<S>776</S>; and men shall worship<S>7812</S> him<S>376</S>, every one from his place<S>4725</S>, even all the isles<S>339</S> of the nations<S>1471</S>.
Ye Ethiopians<S>3569</S> also<S>1992</S>, ye shall be slain<S>2491</S> by my sword<S>2719</S>.

And he will stretch out<S>5186</S> his hand<S>3027</S> against the north<S>6828</S>, and destroy<S>6</S> Assyria<S>804</S>, and will make<S>7760</S> Nineveh<S>5210</S> a desolation<S>8077</S>, and dry<S>6723</S> like the wilderness<S>4057</S>.

And herds<S>5739</S> shall lie down<S>7257</S> in the midst<S>8432</S> of her<S>2416</S>, all the beasts of the nations<S>1471</S>: both the pelican<S>6893</S> and the porcupine<S>7090</S> shall lodge<S>3885</S> in the capitals<S>3730</S> thereof<S>6963</S>; their voice shall sing<S>7891</S> in the windows<S>2474</S>; desolation<S>2721</S> shall be in the thresholds<S>5592</S>: for he hath laid bare<S>6168</S> the cedar-work<S>731</S>.

This is the joyous<S>5947</S> city<S>5892</S> that dwelt<S>3427</S> carelessly<S>983</S>, that said<S>559</S> in her heart<S>3824</S>, I am<S>657</S>, and there is none besides me<S>8047</S>: how is she become a desolation, a place for beasts<S>2416</S> to lie down in<S>4769</S>! every one that passeth by<S>5674</S> her shall hiss<S>8319</S>, and wag<S>5128</S> his hand<S>3027</S>.
Woe<S>1945</S> to her that is rebellious<S>4754</S> and polluted<S>1351</S>! to the oppressing<S>3238</S> city<S>5892</S>!
She obeyed<S>8085</S> not the voice<S>6963</S>; she received<S>3947</S> not correction<S>4148</S>; she trusted<S>982</S> not in Jehovah<S>3068</S>; she drew not near<S>7126</S> to her God<S>430</S>.

Her princes<S>8269</S> in the midst<S>7130</S> of her are roaring<S>7580</S> lions<S>738</S>; her judges<S>8199</S> are evening<S>6153</S> wolves<S>2061</S>; they leave nothing<S>1633</S> till the morrow<S>1242</S>.

Her prophets<S>5030</S> are light<S>6348</S> and treacherous<S>900</S> persons<S>582</S>; her priests<S>3548</S> have profaned<S>2490</S> the sanctuary<S>6944</S>, they have done violence<S>2554</S> to the law<S>8451</S>.

Jehovah<S>3068</S> in the midst<S>7130</S> of her is righteous<S>6662</S>; he will not do<S>6213</S> iniquity<S>5766</S>; every<S>1242</S> morning<S>1242</S> doth he bring<S>5414</S> his justice<S>4941</S> to light<S>216</S>, he faileth<S>5737</S> not<S>5767</S>; but the unjust knoweth<S>3045</S> no shame<S>1322</S>.

I have cut off<S>3772</S> nations<S>1471</S>; their battlements<S>6438</S> are desolate<S>8074</S>; I have made their streets<S>2351</S> waste<S>2717</S>, so that none passeth by<S>5674</S>; their cities<S>5892</S> are destroyed<S>6658</S>, so that there is no man<S>376</S>, so that there is no inhabitant<S>3427</S>.

I said<S>559</S>, Only fear<S>3372</S> thou me<S>3947</S>; receive correction<S>4148</S>; so her dwelling<S>4583</S> shall not be cut off<S>3772</S>, according<S>834</S> to all that I have appointed<S>6485</S> concerning her<S>403</S>: but they rose early<S>7925</S> and corrupted<S>7843</S> all their doings<S>5949</S>.

Therefore wait<S>2442</S> ye for me<S>5002</S>, saith Jehovah<S>3068</S>, until the day<S>3117</S> that I rise up<S>6965</S> to the prey<S>5706</S>; for my determination<S>4941</S> is to gather<S>622</S> the nations<S>1471</S>, that I may assemble<S>6908</S> the kingdoms<S>4467</S>, to pour<S>8210</S> upon them mine indignation<S>2195</S>, even all my fierce<S>2740</S> anger<S>639</S>; for all the earth<S>776</S> shall be devoured<S>398</S> with the fire<S>784</S> of my jealousy<S>7068</S>.

For then will I turn<S>2015</S> to the peoples<S>5971</S> of a pure<S>1305</S> language<S>8193</S>, that they may all call<S>7121</S> upon the name<S>8034</S> of Jehovah<S>3068</S>, to serve<S>5647</S> him with one<S>259</S> consent<S>7926</S>.
From beyond<S>5676</S> the rivers<S>5104</S> of Ethiopia<S>3568</S> my suppliants<S>6282</S>, even the daughter<S>1323</S> of my dispersed<S>6327</S>, shall bring<S>2986</S> mine offering<S>4503</S>.

In that day<S>3117</S> shalt thou not be put to shame<S>954</S> for all thy doings<S>5949</S>, wherein thou hast transgressed<S>6586</S> against me<S>5493</S>; for then I will take away out of the midst<S>7130</S> of thee thy proudly<S>1346</S> exulting<S>5947</S> ones<S>3254</S>, and thou shalt no more be haughty<S>1361</S> in my holy<S>6944</S> mountain<S>2022</S>.

But I will leave<S>7604</S> in the midst<S>7130</S> of thee an afflicted<S>6041</S> and poor<S>1800</S> people<S>5971</S>, and they shall take refuge<S>2620</S> in the name<S>8034</S> of Jehovah<S>3068</S>.

The remnant<S>7611</S> of Israel<S>3478</S> shall not do<S>6213</S> iniquity<S>5766</S>, nor speak<S>1696</S> lies<S>3577</S>; neither shall a deceitful<S>8649</S> tongue<S>3956</S> be found<S>4672</S> in their mouth<S>6310</S>; for they shall feed<S>7462</S> and lie down<S>7257</S>, and none shall make them afraid<S>2729</S>.

Sing<S>7442</S>, O daughter<S>1323</S> of Zion<S>6726</S>; shout<S>7321</S>, O Israel<S>3478</S>; be glad<S>8055</S> and rejoice<S>5937</S> with all the heart<S>3820</S>, O daughter<S>1323</S> of Jerusalem<S>3389</S>.

Jehovah<S>3068</S> hath taken away<S>5493</S> thy judgments<S>4941</S>, he hath cast out<S>6437</S> thine enemy<S>341</S>: the King<S>4428</S> of Israel<S>3478</S>, even Jehovah<S>3068</S>, is in the midst<S>7130</S> of thee<S>7200</S>; thou shalt not fear evil any more<S>7451</S>.
In that day<S>3117</S> it shall be said<S>559</S> to Jerusalem<S>3389</S>, Fear<S>3372</S> thou not<S>6726</S>; O Zion, let not thy hands<S>3027</S> be slack<S>7503</S>.

Jehovah<S>3068</S> thy God<S>430</S> is in the midst<S>7130</S> of thee<S>1368</S>, a mighty one who will save<S>3467</S>; he will rejoice<S>7797</S> over thee with joy<S>8057</S>; he will rest<S>2790</S> in his love<S>160</S>; he will joy<S>1523</S> over thee with singing<S>7440</S>.
I will gather<S>622</S> them that sorrow<S>3013</S> for the solemn assembly<S>4150</S>, who were of thee<S>4864</S>; to whom the burden upon her was a reproach<S>2781</S>.

Behold<S>6256</S>, at that time I will deal<S>6213</S> with all them that afflict<S>6031</S> thee<S>3467</S>; and I will save that which is lame<S>6760</S>, and gather<S>6908</S> that which was driven away<S>5080</S>; and I will make<S>7760</S> them a praise<S>8416</S> and a name<S>8034</S>, whose shame<S>1322</S> hath been in all the earth<S>776</S>.

At that time<S>6256</S> will I bring<S>935</S> you in<S>6256</S>, and at that time will I gather<S>6908</S> you<S>5414</S>; for I will make you a name<S>8034</S> and a praise<S>8416</S> among all the peoples<S>5971</S> of the earth<S>776</S>, when I bring back<S>7725</S> your captivity<S>7622</S> before your eyes<S>5869</S>, saith<S>559</S> Jehovah<S>3068</S>.
